mapper.select: SELECT uo.order_id, uo.order_sn, uo.user_id, uo.shop_id, uoi.spu_id, uoi.sku_id, uoi.goods_name, uoi.goods_img, uoi.sku_spec, uoi.per_price, uoi.buy_num, uo.price, uo.order_status, uo.operator_status, uo.pay_status, uo.pay_time, uo.pay_sn, uo.create_time, uo.remark, uo.receiver_name, uo.receiver_phone, uo.receiver_address, uo.address_status, uo.logistics_company, uo.logistics_no, uo.send_time, uo.finish_time, uoi.is_comment FROM user_order uo inner join user_order_item uoi on uo.order_id = uoi.order_id WHERE order_id = #{orderId} and user_id=#{userId}

select uo.order_id, uoi.goods_name, uoi.goods_img, uoi.sku_spec, uoi.per_price AS per_price, uoi.buy_num, uo.price AS pay_amount, uo.order_status AS status from user_order uo inner join user_order_item uoi on uo.order_id = uoi.order_id where uo.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, i.goods_name AS goodsName, i.goods_img AS goodsImg, i.sku_spec AS skuSpec, i.per_price AS perPrice, i.buy_num AS buyNum, o.price AS payAmount, o.order_status AS status FROM user_order o INNER JOIN user_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE o.order_id IN
#{id}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingPayment, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingShipment, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReceipt, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReview, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refundAfterSales FROM user_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingPayment, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingShipment, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReceipt, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReview, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refundAfterSales FROM user_order WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND is_deleted = 0
